arts.ttl: Rangers win at home again to add to Aberdeen's woes
arts.sum: Hamza Igamane and late goals from substitutes Leon Balogun and Cyriel Dessers earned Rangers a comfortable 3-0 victory as Aberdeen's winless run extended to 12 games.

arts.ttl: Hamza Igamane turns his Rangers brilliance into a game as Aberdeen pay for ridiculous mistakes – 3 talking points
arts.sum: Philippe Clement gets another win at home as he looks to transform his Ibrox record to on the road

arts.ttl: Rangers beat Aberdeen to lift pressure on boss Philippe Clement
arts.sum: Hamza Igamane, Leon Balogun and Cyriel Dessers struck.

arts.ttl: Rangers take early lead after awful Aberdeen mistake!
arts.sum: Hamza Igamane puts Rangers ahead early against Aberdeen as the Dons' centre back Sivert Heltne Nilsen makes a mistake by mis-controlling the ball after the ball was rolled out to him in his own box.

arts.ttl: La Liga side make move to sign 34-goal Rangers star
arts.sum: Leganes are on the hunt to sign a new striker during the winter transfer window, and their latest efforts have seen them turn to Scottish giants Rangers. Sebastien Haller’s loan termination means that a new number nine is needed, and according to Matteo Moretto, Leganes have Cyriel Dessers on their shortlist. As per the report, […] The post La Liga side make move to sign 34-goal Rangers star appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Jefte on exit dream, minnows 'ask about' Dessers and £9m loan star rules set – Rangers transfer state of play
arts.sum: The Light Blues are in need of recruits as they look to close the gap on Celtic

arts.ttl: Rangers vs Aberdeen LIVE as shock starting XI bubbles, key update on traffic to Ibrox and Thelin's surprise
arts.sum: Philippe Clement is under pressure and comes up against a side badly out of form at Ibrox

arts.ttl: Rangers Glasgow musical show to celebrate 'near extinction to stability' – here's how to get remaining tickets
arts.sum: 'The Journey Back' documents the club's fortunes over the past 10 years and will play at the OVO Hydro

arts.ttl: Clement belief undimmed amid Rangers struggles
arts.sum: Philippe Clement insists his belief has not wavered despite his Rangers side coming into this week 15 points behind Celtic in the Scottish Premiership.

arts.ttl: Celtic and Rangers hold exploratory talks to join WSL
arts.sum: Celtic and Rangers have held exploratory talks over a move to play in the Women's Super League, as first reported in The Times.
